round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified that it had no linguistic evidence and pivoted to a high-confidence prediction based entirely on the synthesis of other agents' findings.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent acknowledged the regulatory evidence (LHT) in R2 to lower confidence in Taiwan, refining the reasoning from R1.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent acknowledged the regulatory and landscape evidence in R2 to strengthen the Japan conclusion, though the botanical evidence itself remained unchanged.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent acknowledged the botanical and landscape evidence in R2 to further rule out Taiwan, refining the reasoning.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent acknowledged the regulatory and botanical evidence in R2 to solidify the Japan conclusion.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting the definitive nature of the LHT and guardrail markers. It explicitly eliminated Taiwan based on the driving side (RHT vs LHT) and confirmed the location as Japan.
